subject: Plumeria, a Team Skull admin with distinctive two-tone hair and a crop-top outfit, standing with a confident posture in a forest setting
description: A tall slender humanoid figure stands with arms slightly away from the body, projecting a cool, dominant attitude. The figure has striking two-tone hair (light and dark sections) and wears a black crop-top and dark pants with a midriff-baring style. The background shows green trees and foliage in soft focus. Her expression reads as aloof or dismissive. The composition is a mid-shot centered on the full figure.
foreground: tall slender figure with two-tone hair in dark crop-top outfit, arms loosely at sides
background: green forest foliage in soft focus
